title: MikroTik RouterBOARD RBcAPGi-5acD2nD-XL, cAP XL ac
description: cAP XL ac is a design ceiling extra powerful Access Point from MikroTik with support for WiFi standards 802.11a / b / g / n / ac with modulation speeds 300 Mbps (2.4 GHz) + 866 Mbps (5 GHz). The AP has been designed to blend in with the environment at the installation site. It is ideal for use in operations such as restaurants, hotels, airports, shopping malls, etc. The device can be powered by PoE (passive 18 to 57 V DC or 802.3a / at) and also allows powering other devices via a second port… Unlike traditional control software, which requires a separate PC, CAPsMAN runs on an existing RouterBOARD device in your network! Dual Band WiFi - 300 Mbps (2.4GHz) + 866 Mbps (5GHz) 802.11a / b / g / n / ac support High antenna gain - 6 dBi 2x Gigabit Ethernet with PoE IN and Out support 4-core CPU, 710 MHz, 128 MB RAM Power over PoE 18 - 57V DC, 802.3af / at RouterOS level 4 Device Power cord 24 V/1.2 A power adapter Gigabit PoE injector Mounting kit for wall or ceiling mounting
specsSearch: Wireless features Tx power [dBm] 26 Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11ac, 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11b/g Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 866 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 300 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 26 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 26 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 4 Antenna gain [dBi] 6 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (2) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 802.3at, 17 .. 57V DC PoE type PoE-Out + PoE-In PoE Out ports 1 Max. power consumption [W] 11 Power via connector/terminal 17 .. 57V DC Physical characteristics Design On the wall, Ceiling Purpose Indoor Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 191 Height [mm] 42 Depth [mm] 191 Hardware CPU IPQ-4018 CPU frequency [MHz] 710 CPU cores 4 RAM [MB] 128
